data.acceptance:
- [ ] Per-row 'Add' button is removed from `ScannedAgentRow`.
- [ ] 'registered' Badge is removed from `ScannedAgentRow`.
- [ ] 'Add All' button is removed from `ScannedAgentsList`.
- [ ] Each CLI-type agent row displays the full binary path (e.g. `/usr/local/bin/claude`) below the agent name.
- [ ] All UI references to 'OpenAI' read 'Codex'; `PROVIDER_LABELS.openai` updated to `'Codex'`; detection logic in `agent-identity.ts` returns the updated provider id.
- [ ] The lowercase `agent.id` text preceding the model dropdown in `renderOptionSelector` is removed.
- [ ] Model dropdown is converted to a multi-select; users can choose more than one model per agent.
- [ ] Selected models render as pill badges to the right of the agent row (occupying the former Add/registered area).
- [ ] Add button (section-level) uses dark-green styling (`variant="success"` / emerald-600).
- [ ] Scan button uses light-green styling consistent with the 'Create More' button.
- [ ] Existing lint, typecheck, and tests pass (`bun run lint`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run test`).
